stemHtml: Upper FIR (UIR) – Where an Upper Flight Information Region (UIR) is established, the procedures applicable therein…

options.a: have to be as adopted by ICAO council.
options.b: have to be the same as those established for the Flight Information Region below.
options.c: have to be agreed at regional air navigation meetings.
options.d: do not have to be identical with those for the Flight Information Region below.
